[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100000000 1
1 0110100001 4
2 0110001010 4
3 0111001100 5
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

01 10 0000010111 4
12 21 0001000000 1
23 32 0000001000 1
34 43 0100000000 1 match 0

56 65 0110001010 4 match 2
67 76 0111001100 5 match 3
70 07 1100010100 4

13 31 0000000010 1
